title: Automations: Apply to multiple boards
excerpt:
My team works on 31+ individual boards and I’ve had to set up individual automations for each board… you can imagine how time consuming that is.

posts.author: micaelaromei (Micaela Romei)
posts.cookedHtml:
My team works on 31+ individual boards and I’ve had to set up individual automations for each board… you can imagine how time consuming that is.

I’d love to see a feature when creating automations (+ new subitem automations) where you can hit a button to apply the automations to selected boards!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: That would be great! Have you added that to the features request board?

posts.author: micaelaromei (Micaela Romei)
posts.cookedHtml: I haven’t heard of that- where can I find it?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Feature requests

Submit your product ideas and feedback, tell us about your dream features, and vote to be heard!

Here you go!

posts.author: garfield-labs (Snir Alon)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Micaela - you might find Same Item Multiple Boards useful here. Basically, you can send all those individual boards to one master board, and trigger automations from there. If you create a subitem in the master board, it will be added to the individual board as well. Check it out
